```go
package payment

import (
	"database/sql/driver"
	"time"
)

type UUID string
type Decimal string

func (d *Decimal) Scan(value interface{}) error { return nil }
func (d Decimal) Value() (driver.Value, error) { return nil, nil }

type Currency string
type Provider string
type Status string

const (
	ProviderStripe Provider = "stripe"
	ProviderPaypal Provider = "paypal"
	ProviderAdyen  Provider = "adyen"

	StatusOK       Status = "ok"
	StatusDeclined Status = "declined"
	StatusError    Status = "error"
)

type Transaction struct {
	ID               UUID
	Amount           Decimal
	Currency         Currency
	Provider         Provider
	IdempotencyKey   UUID
}

type Receipt struct {
	TransactionID UUID
	Status        Status
	ErrorCode     *string
	CreatedAt     time.Time
}

type PaymentLog struct {
	TxID       UUID
	Status     Status
	ErrorCode  *string
	CreatedAt  time.Time
}

func AcceptTransaction(tx Transaction) (Receipt, error) { return Receipt{}, nil }
func LogResult(txID, status, errorCode string) error { return nil }
```
